nasb.text: They were equipped with bows, using both the right hand and the left to sling stones and to shoot arrows from the bow; they were Saul’s kinsmen from Benjamin.

esv.text: They were bowmen and could shoot arrows and sling stones with either the right or the left hand; they were Benjaminites, Saul’s kinsmen.

cnv.text: 他們配備弓箭，能用左右兩手開弓甩石射箭；他們都屬便雅憫支派，是掃羅的親族。

ccb.text: 他们是弓箭手，左右手都能甩石射箭，来自便雅悯支派，与扫罗同族。
